emails.subject: Re: ENA ISDA with PEC
emails.body: Brad is in Credit. He sent down a credit worksheet for Enron Midwest LLC. Enron Midwest LLC was not recorded as a corporation in the Corporate Secretary's office. The Confirm Desk called around to get me a contact for that entity. I finally spoke to Kevin Radours in Richard Comoski's office in Chicago. He told me that Enron Midwest was not the 50/50 joint venture with Peoples, as indicated in the Credit worksheet, Midwest Energy Hub was. I placed a call to Brad to correct the Credit information. Brad never returned my phone call. Meanwhile Molly left a message that this Greg Penham wanted to work off the Peoples master. I called Molly to get the scoop about the correct counterparty, and further get the articles bylaws up to Kate's office. Sara Shackleton 08/21/2000 01:52 PM

emails.subject: Re: ENA ISDA with PEC
emails.body: Tana: Have you responded to either Greg or Molly? Please call. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 08/21/2000 08:23 AM Molly Harris 08/18/2000 02:12 PM

emails.subject: Re: ENA ISDA with PEC
emails.body: I left a message for both Molly and Brad Diebner and neither has returned my calls. Sara Shackleton 08/21/2000 08:24 AM

emails.subject: Re: ENA ISDA with PEC
emails.body: Tana: I don't know who Brad Diebner is. However, Greg called me. What Greg really needs is the ENA "form" of ISDA Schedule (with the utility election). He will also need a "generic" Paragraph 13. The boilerplate can be mailed. Before you send, I need to chat with Mark and I'll let you know more later today. Thanks. Sara Tana Jones 08/21/2000 09:14 AM
